feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Is is possible to assign different factory calendar for each company codes?
entry.content:
Hello!

I would like to confirm a couple of things regarding the factory calendar function in the SAP public cloud 2408 system.

1. In our case, there are multiple company codes and each have different calendars to operate on. Therefore, we would like to confirm if different factory calendars can be assigned to each company code separately.

I was trying to create calendars at "Maintain Calendar (180007)" but it did not seem possible to assign a calendar to a specific company code only.

2. What exactly does the factory calendar control in SAP? (to clarify what effect it might have if we were not able to set the different calendars separately)

Thank you in advance!

Fujita

entry.title: Auto cash discount the discount will be calculated on Daily Basis
entry.content: Auto cash discount working for payment to be done earlier before due date for vendor payment. The discount will be calculated on per day basis at fixed %.

entry.title: Auto cash discount the discount will be calculated on Daily Basis
entry.content: Auto cash discount working for payment to be done earlier before due date for vendor payment. The discount will be calculated on per day basis at fixed %.

entry.title: Need to update price with validity period at mass level in agreement (ME32L)
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

 

We are precure material through Agreement ,  now price on material have been changed and there are more that 90 materials in an agreement and there are 10 agreements. It is very hard to change validity with price for all materials. So, we request you to please provide us solution so we can update new price for the same agreements for a new time span. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How can the "Product Groups" fields in the Basic Data 2 view of the Material Master be used?
entry.content:
We would like to use the fields "Product Group Type" and "Product Group" displayed in the "Change Material - MM01" app, within the "Product Groups" section of the Basic Data 2 view.

The goal is to enter information related to our material purchasing categories and sub-categories (e.g., sensors, accessories, tools, etc.) in these fields.

However, these fields are currently greyed out, and we have not been able to find any relevant information online to assist us in using them.

Could you please confirm if these fields are appropriate for storing our purchasing category and sub-category material information ? and are they available in the fiori app "Manage product master" ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Sell stock to Suppliers
entry.content:
Hi,

Currently, our business is trying to sell stock to Suppliers in SAP. Is it possible to sell the stock? If so, what are the steps to be followed/Post goods movement type to be used to sell and also to generate Invoice to the Supplier.

Regards,

Nandini

entry.title: RV_SALES_DOCUMENT_VIEW_3 - Customer selection not working
entry.content:
Hello everyone!

I'm facing an issue with function module RV_SALES_DOCUMENT_VIEW_3 when trying to obtain open sales orders, similar to transaction VA05.

Adding either material or sales order values in VBCOM provides the necessary filtered output. 
However, the filtering doesn't seem to be working by customer number (KUNNR).

Do you have any insights on how this issue can be overcome? I want to filter out open sales orders at a CUSTOMER LEVEL.
Any suggestions welcome.

Best Regards,
Samith

entry.title: Manage Customer Hierarchies - Import customer Hierarchy
entry.content:
Hi Team, 

We  are seeking a method to bulk upload customer hierarchy, but we are unable to locate this option under the 'Import Hierarchy' feature in the 'Manage Global Hierarchy' app. Could you please confirm if it is possible to import customer hierarchy?"

Thank you,

Jyoti


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How can we configure the new Postal City/City number in SAP Public Cloud?
entry.content: Mountain view city is not available in the value help for Business Partner address. Is it configurable by SAP Config expert only?

entry.title: Error when replicate Business Partner from S/4HANA Cloud Public to SAP Cloud for Customer (CPI)
entry.content:
Hello there,

I´m try to integrate SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public to SAP Cloud for Customer with SAP Integration Suite, but, when I´m try to replicate BP to C4C using the communication arrangement SAP_COM_0008, SAP C4C return the next error for integration:

No supported role for business partner 1xxxxxxx

Someone have any idea, how I can solve this issue?

 

Thanks,

entry.title: Document Type defaulted on FI invoice
entry.content:
Dear Community,

We are creating supplier invoices via API Journal Entry - Post. 

In our payload, <AccountingDocumentTpe> is empty. 

But in SAP the journal entry is still posted, with document type 'AB'. 

There is no validation/substitution logic, or BADi, that could explain this behavior. 

I also do not see anything related in the custo. 

Is there a document type used by default in SAP S/4HANA Cloud?

Thank you and regards,

Anaïs

entry.title: How to create Text ID for Purchase Order in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sourcing and Procurement

Need to add text field in above section

entry.title: Is FSCM available in SAP Public cloud?
entry.content:
Hi,

Is FSCM available in SAP Public cloud? if yes, what is the scope item.

On checking the "Digital discovery" could not find any. I am not looking for BD6 or 1QM.

Best Regards,

Dave

entry.title: Is it possible to create multiple entries with the same key in the source list?
entry.content:
Hi!

We have an issue with our SAP public cloud system that we will need to create multiple entries with the same key in the source list.

We are aware that we get error "System message 06 329" when we try to crate multiple entries with the same key. In private cloud or On-premise, we were able to change the "error" into "warning" or "information" but we are not sure if that is possible in the public cloud system as well.

Could anyone tell us if it is possible to convert this error into "warning" or "information" and enable creation of entries with the same key on the source list?

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Basic Credit Management (BD6): Exlcude a payment term (prepayments) from credit limit calculation
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

Using Basic Credit Management (BD6) for S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408. I would like to know if it is possible to exclude a specific payment term from the credit limit calculation.

Specifically, we want to exclude a specific payment term for payments made in advance (prepayments).
Our goal is that a sales order created with this payment term will never be cheked against a customer's credit limit.

Thank you for your help.

Best regards,
Simon

entry.title: Error accessing CDS View
entry.content:
An error when accessing the following CDS View to get the due date.

 

  • I_FinTransCondition
  • I_FinTransCndnSingleDate

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to set a Pricing Condition type to inactive during Sales order creation/Change
entry.content:
Hello experts,

We are trying to set a custom condition type to Inactive/active status in Pricing during Sales order creation / change based on few condition checks in BADI's : PRCG_DOCUMENT_ITEM_REQUIREMENT and PRICING_DOCUMENT_REQUIREMENT.

could you please suggest if its feasible using the Above BADI's or if there is any alternative solution.

Thank you In Advance.

entry.title: What BADIs are available for Service Contracts?
entry.content:
There is a requirement to know what BADIs are available for Service Contracts


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP EPPM public cloud
entry.content: 1- SAP EPPM public cloud Field requirement and the Notification possibilities

entry.title: Synchronization of GL accounts to CIM seems incomplete
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

After setting up the master data synchronization between SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and SAP Ariba Central Invoice Management  we see that the GL-accounts are not synced completely. That means that the number of GL-accounts in S/4 Cloud (company code view) had more accounts then are ever synced to CIM. The number of missing accounts is different on every environment and we also don't see any logic in which accounts are synced and which aren't

As far as I know, from documentation there should be no filtering on the accounts, which in my opinion should result in all accounts from S/4 cloud to be available in CIM. We see this behavior on customer systems but also on our TDD environment. 

Does anyone have this similar problem and do you have pointers to solve this problem?

best regards,

Jeroen
